name: com.aihomedesign/aihomedesign-mcp
title: AI HomeDesign
description: MCP server to virtually stage, redesign, enhance and declutter real-estate photos.

connector_token.description: Your personal connector token. Generate it at https://aihomedesign.com/mcp by pasting your AI HomeDesign API key — the token is returned in the connector URL and looks like 'aihd_...'. Treat it like a password.
